title: AS-IS: Lead Capture — 01B Richmond (representative of 5 per-location)
caption: Lead capture runs as 5 published per-location workflows (01A Home, 01B Richmond, 01C VA Beach, 01D NPN, 01E Consultation), each with an identical shape: set contact fields, add source/attribution tags, then branch. Shown is 01B Richmond's real step graph; 01A and 01E are larger (202 steps) but structurally parallel.

title: AS-IS: Non-Booked New Leads (02. NON BOOKED NEWLEADS)
caption: The one published non-booked follow-up, entered from 6 triggers. Its real step graph: an opening wait, then if/else branching. Copy and timing are exactly as configured today — no rewrite.
src:
flowchart TD N1(["React App
Funnel Entry Newport News
Funnel Entry Virginia Beach
Funnel Entry Richmond
Funnel Entry Home
Funnel Entry Consultation"]) N2["Wait 0 minutes after"] N1 --> N2 N3{"Check for active appointment?"} N2 --> N3 N4{"yes"} N3 -->|"Does not have tag 'funnel_consultation_…"| N4 N5["Wait 3 minutes after"] N4 -->|"Richmond"| N5 N6["+2 more steps"] N5 --> N6 N7["Wait 3 minutes after"] N4 -->|"VA Beach"| N7 N8["+2 more steps"] N7 --> N8 N9["Wait 3 minutes after"] N4 -->|"NPN"| N9 N10["+2 more steps"] N9 --> N10 N11["Wait 0 minutes after"] N4 -->|"None"| N11 N12["+1 more steps"] N11 --> N12 N13{"None"} N3 -->|"None"| N13 style N1 fill:#1e40af,color:#fff style N2 fill:#b45309,color:#fff style N3 fill:#0f766e,color:#fff style N4 fill:#0f766e,color:#fff style N5 fill:#b45309,color:#fff style N6 fill:#374151,color:#fff style N7 fill:#b45309,color:#fff style N8 fill:#374151,color:#fff style N9 fill:#b45309,color:#fff style N10 fill:#374151,color:#fff style N11 fill:#b45309,color:#fff style N12 fill:#374151,color:#fff style N13 fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

published · 5 trig · 77 steps
if/else: LOCATION"] G1["03b. Unconfirmed Appointment – Confirmation Requi…

if/else: Check for Reply"] G3["03d. Update Appointment Status
published · 3 trig · 12 steps

published · 1 trig · 5 steps"] G5["04a. Intake Form Response
published · 2 trig · 4 steps
if/else: Intake form or Intake Survey?"] G6["Intake Reminder

title: AS-IS: Clinic Outcome (05. Clinic Appt Outcome — the keystone)
caption: The keystone outcome workflow, entered from 7 triggers (PA-reported Showed / No-Show / Cancelled / Rescheduled …). Its real graph branches on the visit outcome, then again per location (VA Beach / Newport / Richmond), sending the outcome email and moving the Opportunity. This is the exact live branching the rebuild replaces with a single PCC-driven writer.
src:
flowchart TD N1(["PA reported Px SHOWED
PA reported PX Cancelled
PA reported PX Rescheduled
Px Cancelled calendar Appt: Newport
PA reported PX is No show
Px Cancelled calendar Appt: VA beach"]) N2["Remove from Workflow-unconfirmed flow"] N1 --> N2 N3["Remove tag: funnel_consultation_booked"] N2 --> N3 N4{"Clinic visit OUTCOME that Triggered WF"} N3 --> contac…"] N14 --> N15 N16{"None"} N6 -->|"None"| N16 N17["Set appt: cancelled"] N4 -->|"PA reported PX Cancelled"| N17 N18{"Check appt Location"} N17 --> N18 N19["Email: You canceled your appointment with location.n…"] N18 -->|"VA Beach"| N19 N20["Opp create — lost"] N19 --> N20 N21["Wait 0.2 minutes after"] N20 --> N21 N22["Email: You canceled your appointment with location.n…"] N18 -->|"Newport"| N22 N23["Opp create — lost"] N22 --> N23 N24["Go to: Wait 12 seconds to make sure contac…"] N23 --> N24 N25["Email: You canceled your appointment with location.n…"] N18 -->|"Richmond"| N25 N26["Opp create — lost"] N25 --> N26 N27["Go to: Wait 12 seconds to make sure contac…"] N26 --> N27 N28{"None"} N18 -->|"None"| N28 N29{"PA reported PX Resched"} N4 -->|"PA reported PX Resched"| N29 N30["Email: Appointment Cancelled: Newport News Clinic / …"] N4 -->|"Px Cancelled calendar Appt: Newport"| N30 N31["Set appt: cancelled"] N30 --> N31 N32["Opp create — lost"] N31 --> N32 N33["Wait title: AS-IS: No-Show / Cancel Recovery + MUT
caption: The live recovery pieces among the 28: 08. MUT (Medically Untreatable), Cancelled Appointments, and Nurture: Missed Clinic Appointment — with their real triggers and step counts. There is no consolidated multi-touch no-sale sequence in the active folder.
src:
flowchart TD G0["08. MUT Medically Untreatable
published · 1 trig · 11 steps
if/else: Condition"] G1["Cancelled Appointments
published · 3 trig · 9 steps
if/else: Check appt Location"] G2["Nurture: Missed Clinic Appointment
published · 0 trig · 21 steps
if/else: Check if lead has booked an appointment…"] style G0 fill:#166534,color:#fff style G1 fill:#166534,color:#fff style G2 fill:#166534,color:#fff

title: AS-IS: Retention + Long-Term Nurture — no active counterpart
caption: None of the 28 Active Workflows is a retention / renewal or long-term nurture flow. This to-be layer has no current-state counterpart in the Active Workflows folder — there is no live retention automation to document.
src:
flowchart TD NOTE["No active-workflow counterpart"] NOTE --> D1["Retention / renewal nurture is NOT present
in the Active Workflows folder"] NOTE --> D2["Long-term nurture COLD/WARM/HOT is NOT present
in the Active Workflows folder"] D1 --> SCOPE(["Out of scope for current-state:
no live retention automation among the 28"]) D2 --> SCOPE style NOTE fill:#374151,color:#fff style D1 fill:#374151,color:#fff style D2 fill:#374151,color:#fff style SCOPE fill:#b45309,color:#fff

title: AS-IS: Support and Infrastructure cluster
caption: Support/infra workflows in the active folder: 1. IVR - simultaneous, 2. DNC/wrong number/SMS & Call Errors (11 triggers), 3. Email Bounce, 4a & 4b Call Disposition (9 triggers each), Chat Widget Out of Office Hours, and the Vercel Outbound Webhook — each with its real trigger and step counts.

published · 9 trig · 75 steps

published · 1 trig · 6 steps
if/else: Condition"] G6["Outbound Webhook
